seoTitle: Create Data Using Blank Query in Power BI From Scratch
metaDescription: Learn how to use Power BI's Blank Query feature to build custom data from scratch and apply transformations for analysis-ready datasets.
intro: A Blank Query in Power BI gives you a starting point to build data from scratch when no existing source fits your needs. This guide covers setting up your environment, creating a blank query, and applying transformations to prepare it for analysis.

steps.heading: Set up Power BI
steps.body: Open Power BI and make sure your environment is ready before creating a new query from scratch.

steps.heading: Create your first Blank Query
steps.body: Use the Blank Query option to start building a dataset without relying on an existing external source.

steps.heading: Transform data with Blank Queries
steps.body: Apply the necessary transformation steps to shape your blank query into a usable dataset ready for reporting.

steps.heading: Explore use cases for business reporting
steps.body: Blank Queries are useful for automating tasks like consolidating monthly sales reports or building custom reference tables that don't map to a single source.

steps.heading: Follow best practices for integrating automation
steps.body: Once your Blank Query is built, integrate it with your broader data model and consider automation to keep it aligned with your evolving reporting needs.

faq.question: When should I use a Blank Query instead of importing a file?
faq.answer: A Blank Query is useful when you need to build custom logic or a dataset that doesn't map directly to an existing file or external source.

faq.question: Can a Blank Query pull data from multiple sources?
faq.answer: Yes, a Blank Query can be built to combine or reference data from multiple existing queries and sources within your Power BI model.

faq.question: Is using a Blank Query difficult for Power BI beginners?
faq.answer: It requires a bit more understanding of Power Query's interface than simple data import, but it's still approachable for beginners willing to follow a step-by-step process.

faq.question: Do Blank Queries update automatically when connected sources change?
faq.answer: If your Blank Query references other live data sources, it can reflect updates on refresh, similar to standard queries in Power BI.
